pi_items.source: Google Play Store listing and multiple APK repositories confirm this is the correct package name for Flight Crew View app
Official Google Play Store page and developer's official website (flightcrewview.com) confirm this is the correct app name

Task description explicitly states 'Enable Do Not Disturb mode so it is currently active.' Verifier confirms DND must be ON (zen_mode values 1, 2, or 3, not 0) for task success. Android zen_mode 0=OFF, 1=IMPORTANT, 2=NO_INTERRUPTIONS, 3=ALARMS.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on Flight Crew View (com.robert.fcView), a real Android app published on Google Play Store and used by over 40,000 aviation professionals. The app is developed by Robert Murray under Flight Crew Apps LLC. The task requires enabling Android's Do Not Disturb (Zen Mode) and adding the app to the DND exception list so it can send notifications during DND. The task operates on a real, non-synthetic Android application with actual system settings.
